---

## 📝 Content to Update

**File(s) that need updating:**
- Example: `201-helpful-prompts.md`

## 🔄 What Needs to Change?

**Current content:**
```
Paste the current content here
```

**Suggested update:**
```
Paste your suggested changes here
```

## 💡 Reason for Update

Why does this content need updating?
- [ ] Outdated information
- [ ] Broken link
- [ ] Unclear explanation
- [ ] Missing information
- [ ] Better example available
- [ ] Technical error
- [ ] Other: _____

## 🎓 How This Helps Students

How will this update improve the learning experience?

## 📚 Additional Resources

Any links or resources to support your suggestion?
